summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected. Security-sensitive refs are quarantined; all other open PRs are kept as independent maintainer-review or author-follow-up items because merge, fix, and close actions are not enabled for this job.

actions.reason: Exec-adjacent security-boundary PR is out of ProjectClownfish backlog cleanup scope and should go to central OpenClaw security handling.
Useful maintainer PR with active follow-up and review blockers; not a duplicate or low-signal close candidate.
Narrow docs PR with proof and clean docs checks, but merge is blocked by job mode/actions and maintainer review is still required.
Focused contributor PR with sufficient proof, but this plan-mode job cannot merge and there is no close/supersede basis.
Active maintainer-owned UI polish PR with review findings; keep it for author follow-up rather than closing or escalating the whole cluster.
Useful provider compatibility PR awaiting maintainer review; no duplicate/supersede or close basis in this inventory shard.
Broad runtime/security-boundary PR must be quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling rather than backlog cleanup.
Useful small PR with rebase/change blockers; keep independent for author/maintainer follow-up.
Useful contributor PR but proof and review-bot issues block merge/fixed-by closeout; no low-signal close permission is enabled.
Related to an open product/bug issue but not safe to close, merge, or mark fixed; keep as an independent blocked PR.
Security-sensitive linked restore-docs PR must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling, without poisoning unrelated non-security restore docs work.
